title: anatherum refractum
intro: Anatherum refractum, also known as Desert Cane or Indian Rice Grass, is a type of perennial grass that is native to tropical and subtropical regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Anatherum refractum include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as providing relief from digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Anatherum refractum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
